Crafting Digital Worlds

AI Artist & Game Developer

Specializing in anime-style illustrations, high-concept game visuals, and immersive Unity experiences.

View Work Explore Projects
About Me

Fusing Art & Technology

I am a passionate creator who bridges the gap between imagination and playable reality. With a strong foundation in both Unity game development and cutting-edge AI artist tools, I craft compelling visual narratives and aesthetic environments.

Core Arsenal

Midjourney Stable Diffusion Unity 3D / C# Runway ML
Project 1

Whispering Woods

An enchanted fantasy adventure exploring ruined forests and mystical creatures.

Whispering Woods

An atmospheric exploration game focusing on environmental storytelling within an ancient, overgrown mystical forest.

Crystal Guardian Sylvani

Action RPG character design project featuring a nature-bound elven warrior wielding enchanted crystal weaponry.

Elemental Bestiary

Dynamic enemy concept art showcasing a feral nature golem and an ethereal blue lightning elemental.

Project 2

Cyber Protocol

A high-octane sci-fi action game concept featuring cybernetic ninjas, mechanized spider drones, and neon environments.

Environment

Neon Jungle Base

Protagonist

Cyber-Ninja Player

Arsenal

Energy Blade & Blasters

Enemies

Mechanized Spider-Drones

Project 3

Scavenger Squad

Early ideation and concept art for a multiplayer island adventure.

Island Environment

Isometric lush tropical island overview with ancient ruins and hidden bases.

Gameplay Loop & Squad

Breakdown of the core team, traps, weapons, and 'Sail, Scramble, Survive' loop.

Ecosystem Bestiary

Concept art for island threats like the Spider-Crab, Trench-Worm, and Scavenger Plant.

Trapper Concept Sheet

Detailed orthographics, netting devices, and bandolier layout for the Trapper class.

Explorer's Sketchbook

Environmental design explorations focusing on coastal approaches and cave lairs.

Gallery

Concept Arts Collection

A diverse collection of character designs ranging from sci-fi heroes to tribal warriors.

Neon Vanguard

Clean vector-style sci-fi combat suit with electric aura.

Chibi Plasma Blade

Stylized miniature character design for light RPG projects.

Vanguard Animation Frames

Idle and walking cycle sprite sheet for 2D platforming logic.

Tribal Guardians

Detailed orthographic exploration of heavy tribal mechanics and armor.

Aristocrat Strategist

Portrait iterations for a sharp, steampunk-inspired tactical leader.
